title: Bridge Essay: An insight-related neural reward signal.
concept: Spontaneous thought — mind-wandering, DMN, creative insight, involuntary cognition.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Non-fabrication** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Non-fabrication — spontaneous thought, mind-wandering, DMN, creative insight.
**Phase context:** Spontaneous thought — mind-wandering, DMN, creative insight, involuntary cognition.

**An insight-related neural reward signal.** — Neuroimage (2020). DOI: 10.1016/j.neuroimage.2020.116757. PMID: 32194279. Moments of insight, a phenomenon of creative cognition in which an idea suddenly emerges into awareness as an "Aha!" are often reported to be affectively positive experiences. We tested the hypothesis that problem-solving by insight is accompanied by neural reward processing. We recorded high-density EEGs while participants solved a series of anagrams.
